caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold across the chest is seated at a desk in a studio. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring yellow stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE," while a banner above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black mug with "BOSS TALK" text sits on the table to his right. As the scene progresses, the man reacts with laughter and smiles, shifting his posture slightly. He begins by gesturing with his right hand, then leans back and laughs, and finally settles back into a seated position, continuing to smile while looking toward someone off-screen. A small logo with "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene.
